title: After U.S. Aid Fell by 99%, E.U. Pledges $106 Billion Loan to Ukraine
summary_full: Unlike previous European assistance packages, the latest one is heavily weighted toward military spending, reflecting a view that the war is far from over.
summary_public: Unlike previous European assistance packages, the latest one is heavily weighted toward military spending, reflecting a view that the war is far from over.
